## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Minimal Reproducer

```go
// Paste the smallest possible Go snippet that reproduces the issue
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or stack trace.

## Additional Context
